comment: WS3 golden fixture (redacted, NOT a raw live probe). One invoice item as Clockify returns it on the wire: `unitPrice` is minor*100 (hundredths of a cent) so amount = unitPrice*quantity/100. A $1000 item => 100000 minor => 10000000 on the wire. Replayed offline by make replay-fixtures asserting invoiceItemUnitPriceFromWire(10000000) === 100000. See spec/evidence/discrepancies.md `invoices.items-unit-price-scale`.
